reason: The remaining noisy admission surface is split across real owner boundaries rather than one clean leak.

remaining_noisy_probe_results.note: Still overlaps with dispute-flavored acceptance wording.
Bare timing/acceptance wording remains too entangled.
Procedure wording with bare պառկեցնում remains too noisy.
Still split away from the admission root.
Still ambiguous enough that a broader move would likely widen theft.

why_not: The remaining surface does not share one clean lexical boundary.
Bare ընդունում/պառկեցնում timing wording overlaps with complaint_unexpected_payment_dispute_v2 in current runtime behavior.
Broadening the admission guard further would risk stealing non-admission surfaces and weakening the payment-dispute owner.
narrow_slices_completed: admission policy wording framed as conditions/cases for hospital or inpatient acceptance
next_recommended_step: Pause further admission/inpatient breadth patching and transition to Phase 5 completion / Phase 6 readiness.
